summary: Verified P0 security gate on POST /api/membership/activate. Both branches of the ALLOW_DEV_MEMBERSHIP_BYPASS env flag work as designed: flag=1 (dev) → 200 + Pro activated + WARN audit log; flag unset OR '0' → 403 with detail pointing at /api/payments/order + /api/payments/verify Razorpay flow. /api/payments/order is NOT affected by the gate. Full regression 221 passed / 2 skipped (216 baseline + 5 new gate tests, zero regressions). .env restored to ALLOW_DEV_MEMBERSHIP_BYPASS=1 after all env-mutating tests.

minor.issue: Razorpay test keys in dev .env return 'Authentication failed' → endpoint responds 502. Pre-existing, unrelated to this iteration's fix. Gate tests still validate that /api/payments/order is REACHABLE (not 403). Recommend rotating rzp_test_* keys in /app/backend/.env before real Razorpay flow testing.

action_items: Before Play Store publish: ensure production .env does NOT contain ALLOW_DEV_MEMBERSHIP_BYPASS (or set to '0'). Add a CI/deploy assertion.
Rotate Razorpay test keys — current keys fail auth (unrelated to this fix, but blocks e2e payment demo).
Consider hoisting the gate into a shared dependency so future dev-only endpoints inherit the same behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Gate is correct — checks `!= '1'` so any tampering (unset, empty, '0', 'true', 'yes') safely denies. Good.
WARN log emits user_pin only (no PII, no flag secret) — audit-safe.
403 detail message includes route hints for the caller — helpful for API consumers, no info leak.
Frontend bypass button in MembershipPage.jsx correctly hidden outside `import.meta.env.DEV || hostname.includes('preview.emergent')` — defense-in-depth.
test_credentials: Not required for this test — endpoint is unauthenticated by design (which is exactly why the gate is P0).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 app_membership doc for user_pin=TEST_bypass_pin_9999 during gate-ON test; deleted post-test via mongosh.
context_for_next_testing_agent: .env verified restored to ALLOW_DEV_MEMBERSHIP_BYPASS=1 at end of run. Tests toggle .env + restart backend via supervisor — each test has a finally-block restore. If a future iteration edits /app/backend/.env, be aware this test file also mutates it. Razorpay test keys are broken (Auth failed) — pre-existing, do not chase.

verification_evidence.warn_log_line_present: WARNING:perk_orbit.billing:DEV BYPASS: Pro activated for TEST_bypass_pin_9999 without payment (ALLOW_DEV_MEMBERSHIP_BYPASS=1)
